info.name: MyScale SQL (ClickHouse HTTP) Interface
info.description: MyScale is a SQL vector database built on a ClickHouse fork (MyScaleDB). Its primary interface is SQL executed over the ClickHouse-compatible HTTP interface (HTTPS, port 8443). Send SQL in the request body and authenticate with the cluster username and password via HTTP Basic auth or X-ClickHouse-User / X-ClickHouse-Key headers. Vector search is expressed in SQL with the distance() function over VECTOR INDEX columns.

request.description: GET the root of the HTTP interface; returns 'Ok.' when the cluster is reachable.

body.raw:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.articles
(
    id UInt64,
    title String,
    content_vector Array(Float32),
    CONSTRAINT cons_vec_len CHECK length(content_vector) = 768,
    VECTOR INDEX article_idx content_vector TYPE HNSWFLAT('metric_type=Cosine')
)
ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id

request.description: Execute DDL over the ClickHouse HTTP interface to create a table with a VECTOR INDEX.
Insert data by sending an INSERT ... FORMAT statement; the rows go in the request body.

body.raw:
SELECT id, title, distance(content_vector, [0.1, 0.2, 0.3]) AS dist
FROM default.articles
ORDER BY dist ASC
LIMIT 10

request.description: Run a vector similarity search in SQL using the distance() function ordered by distance.
